item.title: Heating and Shaping a Forged Tomahawk
item.description: A tomahawk is heated and forged to shape, showing controlled hammer work and metal forming techniques used in traditional blade and tool making.

media:content.media:title: Heating and Shaping a Forged Tomahawk
media:content.media:description: A tomahawk is heated and forged to shape, showing controlled hammer work and metal forming techniques used in traditional blade and tool making.

item.title: Forging an Axe from a Railroad Spike
item.description: A blacksmith transforms a railroad spike into a functional axe, demonstrating heating, shaping, and forging techniques in traditional metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Axe from a Railroad Spike
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith transforms a railroad spike into a functional axe, demonstrating heating, shaping, and forging techniques in traditional metalwork.

item.title: Opening Gifts and Trying the Anvil
item.description: Unwrapping gifts and putting a new anvil to use. A hands-on look at tools, technique, and first impressions in a practical workshop setting.

media:content.media:title: Opening Gifts and Trying the Anvil
media:content.media:description: Unwrapping gifts and putting a new anvil to use. A hands-on look at tools, technique, and first impressions in a practical workshop setting.

item.title: Railroad Spike Axe Build and Finish
item.description: A forged railroad spike is shaped into a functional axe. Step-by-step metalworking shows the transformation from raw steel to a finished, usable tool.

media:content.media:title: Railroad Spike Axe Build and Finish
media:content.media:description: A forged railroad spike is shaped into a functional axe. Step-by-step metalworking shows the transformation from raw steel to a finished, usable tool.

item.title: Forging a Steel Cable Axe Part 1
item.description: Steel cable is forged into a rough axe form. This first part covers shaping, heating, and initial forming as the tool begins to take shape in the forge.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Steel Cable Axe Part 1
media:content.media:description: Steel cable is forged into a rough axe form. This first part covers shaping, heating, and initial forming as the tool begins to take shape in the forge.

item.title: Miner’s Candlestick Forging Process
item.description: A traditional miner’s candlestick is forged in the workshop. Watch the forming, shaping, and finishing steps as steel is transformed into a functional historical tool.

media:content.media:title: Miner’s Candlestick Forging Process
media:content.media:description: A traditional miner’s candlestick is forged in the workshop. Watch the forming, shaping, and finishing steps as steel is transformed into a functional historical tool.

item.title: Forging a Square Knot Hook Project
item.description: Watch a square knot hook come to life in the forge, from raw steel to finished piece. A look at shaping, heating, and blacksmithing techniques in a workshop setting.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Square Knot Hook Project
media:content.media:description: Watch a square knot hook come to life in the forge, from raw steel to finished piece. A look at shaping, heating, and blacksmithing techniques in a workshop setting.

item.title: Forging a Hook from Scrap Metal
item.description: A piece of scrap metal is transformed into a strong, functional hook. Step-by-step forging process shows heating, shaping, and finishing in a traditional blacksmithing workshop.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Hook from Scrap Metal
media:content.media:description: A piece of scrap metal is transformed into a strong, functional hook. Step-by-step forging process shows heating, shaping, and finishing in a traditional blacksmithing workshop.

item.title: Installing a Heavy-Duty Leg Vise in the Shop
item.description: A detailed look at installing a heavy-duty leg vise in a blacksmithing shop. Step-by-step setup, alignment, and mounting for improved stability and workflow.

media:content.media:title: Installing a Heavy-Duty Leg Vise in the Shop
media:content.media:description: A detailed look at installing a heavy-duty leg vise in a blacksmithing shop. Step-by-step setup, alignment, and mounting for improved stability and workflow.
